expectations.text: Review references 'v18/dev' as the target branch (not 'main')
expectations.evidence: The review header states 'Target branch: v18/dev'.

expectations.text: Review discusses the behavioral impact of changing the default payload type
expectations.evidence: The 'Breaking Change Assessment' section extensively discusses the behavioral impact: 'any installation that has NOT explicitly set Umbraco:Webhook:PayloadType in their appsettings.json will silently move from Legacy to Minimal on upgrade.' It details all consumption paths (WebhookSettings, UmbracoBuilder, WebhookEventCollectionBuilderExtensions) and const baking implications.
Review is 124 lines, under the 150 line limit.

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues (formatting, whitespace, naming conventions, comment grammar, code style preferences) unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: All findings are substantive: behavioral breaking change, stale documentation, const ABI concerns, and telemetry alignment. No cosmetic issues flagged.

expectations.text: Does NOT flag the ~30 builder extension methods with Legacy defaults (pre-existing, not changed in the PR)
expectations.evidence: The review mentions WebhookEventCollectionBuilderExtensions.AddCms in the context of how the default is consumed (a valid analysis of impact), but does not flag the ~30 builder extension methods as issues to fix. The discussion is about the impact of the constant change, not flagging pre-existing code.

expectations.text: Flags stale WebhookSettings.cs docs as a side-effect of the constant value change
expectations.evidence: The 'Stale Documentation' section explicitly states: 'WebhookSettings.cs -- Remarks not updated' and 'This remark is now doubly stale: Legacy is no longer the default'. Also flags WebhookPayloadType.Minimal remarks. Both are correctly identified as side effects of the constant change.

expectations.text: Identifies affected consumers outside the PR (WebhookSettings, UmbracoBuilder, or WebhookEventCollectionBuilderExtensions)
expectations.evidence: All three are explicitly identified: 'WebhookSettings.StaticPayloadType is initialised from Constants.Webhooks.DefaultPayloadType', 'UmbracoBuilder.Collections.cs reads from configuration at startup', 'WebhookEventCollectionBuilderExtensions.AddCms uses Constants.Webhooks.DefaultPayloadType as its default parameter value'.
